name: @paladinfi/eliza-plugin-trust
description: Pre-trade trust verification for ElizaOS evm agents — composed OFAC SDN + GoPlus + Etherscan + lookalike risk gate via x402-paid PaladinFi API on Base. Skeleton release; full LLM-prompt integration landing in v0.1.0.
author: Mallesh @ Malcontent Games LLC (PaladinFi) <dev@paladinfi.com>

PALADIN_TRUST_API_BASE.description: Base URL for PaladinFi API. Defaults to https://swap.paladinfi.com if unset.

PALADIN_TRUST_MODE.description: 'preview' (free; sample-fixture response) or 'paid' (x402-settled at $0.001 USDC/call on Base). Defaults to 'preview' for v0.0.1 — paid mode requires the wallet runtime to support x402 settlement and is wired in v0.1.0.

PALADIN_TRUST_DEFAULT_CHAIN_ID.description: EIP-155 chain id for trust-check requests when not derived from message context. PaladinFi v1 supports Base only (8453). Other EVMs return 400.
